# MEOK AI Labs — Changelog

> Public updates log. Every shipped feature, every audit, every sigil.

## 2026-06-14 — E2E empire live

10 static sub-domains + 17 keystone endpoints + 6/6 MEOK compliance packages installable + 95 email drafts staged + 25 prospects qualified. 25 sigils on Ed25519 chain.

## 2026-06-13 — MEOK Gaming hive

3 MCP servers, 20 tools under COAI INTELLIGENCE_ONLY, 4 Sigil + 1 sigil chain of 9+.

## 2026-05 — Keystone + first 50 MCP servers

meok-attestation-api.vercel.app v1.0.0 → v1.2.0. 17 endpoints.

## 2026-04 — CSOAI council

UK 16939677. csoai.org. 6+ charter articles, 12-framework crosswalk.

## 2026-03 — Sovereign AI OS

meok.ai. 145KB home. Persistent memory, multi-LLM, Maternal Covenant.

## Upcoming
- 2026-07-04: MEOK Launch — the Black Swan
- 2026-08-02: EU AI Act Article 50 cliff
